descriptors.hypothesis_evaluation.description: Descriptor names for hypothesis evaluation. hypothesis_status uses categorical kind; hypothesis_score and hypothesis_rank use absolute kind; observation_score.{ID} uses categorical kind with dot-notation for per-prediction scoring.

descriptors.hypothesis_status_values.description: Controlled values for the hypothesis_status categorical descriptor.

descriptors.observation_score_values.description: Controlled values for observation_score.{ID} categorical descriptors.

hypothesis.origin.source_type.description: How the hypothesis was generated. Distinct from root source_type which describes data provenance.

hypothesis.origin.reasoning_chain.basis.description: Epistemic basis for each step in the reasoning chain.

hypothesis.mechanism.elementary_steps.ro.description: Kinetic role of an elementary step in the proposed mechanism.

hypothesis.mechanism.length_scale.determ.description: Physical process that sets the characteristic length scale.

hypothesis.predictions.direction.description: Expected direction of change in the predicted descriptor relative to the reference condition.

hypothesis.predictions.test_domain.description: What kind of evidence record would test this prediction. Reuses record_domain values.

hypothesis.predictions.falsification_qua.description: Comparison operator for machine-readable falsification criteria.

hypothesis.scope.transferability.general.description: How broadly the hypothesis mechanism applies beyond the primary material system.

hypothesis.scope.transferability.confide.description: Confidence that the hypothesis transfers to the specified material system.

hypothesis.group.role_in_group.description: Role of this hypothesis within a competing hypothesis group.
